syntax_3872.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3872.title: Has Potion
syntax_3872.description: Checks whether a living entity has the given potion effects.

en: Checks whether a living entity has the given potion effects.

syntax_3873.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3873.title: Is Block
syntax_3873.description: Checks whether an item type is a block.

en: Checks whether an item type is a block.

syntax_3874.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3874.title: Is Divisible
syntax_3874.description: Checks whether a number is divisible by the given number.
syntax_3874.syntax_pattern:
%numbers% (is|are) divisible by %number%
%number% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) divisible by %number%

en: Checks whether a number is divisible by the given number.

syntax_3875.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3875.title: Is Prime
syntax_3875.description: Checks whether the given number is prime.

en: Checks whether the given number is prime.

syntax_3876.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3876.title: Is Within
syntax_3876.description: Checks whether the given location is between two locations.

en: Checks whether the given location is between two locations.

syntax_3877.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3877.title: Midi
syntax_3877.description: Checks whether a midi with the given ID is playing.

en: Checks whether a midi with the given ID is playing.

syntax_3878.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3878.title: Within Border
syntax_3878.description: Checks whether the given locations are in the given world border.

en: Checks whether the given locations are in the given world border.

syntax_3879.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3879.title: File existance
syntax_3879.syntax_pattern:
file %string% (does|does(n't| not)) exist
existance of [file] %string% is %boolean%

en: Checks whether a file exists.

syntax_3880.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3880.title: Branch
syntax_3880.description: Executes the lines below X times.

en: Executes the lines below X times.

syntax_3881.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3881.title: Clear Item Recipes
syntax_3881.description: Clears all recipes for the given items.

en: Clears all recipes for the given items.
Clears all recipes.

syntax_3883.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3883.title: Client Block
syntax_3883.description: Makes a player see a block as another type of block (e.g. client side). Any update from the server will change it back.

en: Makes a player see a block as another type of block (e.g. client side). Any update from the server will change it back.

syntax_3884.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3884.title: Client Sign
syntax_3884.description: Makes a player see lines of a sign as the given texts (e.g. client side).
syntax_3884.syntax_pattern: make %players% see lines of %blocks% as %string%, %string%, %string%( and|,) %string%

en: Makes a player see lines of a sign as the given texts (e.g. client side).

syntax_3885.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3885.title: Escape
syntax_3885.description: Skip the execution of a number of lines.

en: Skip the execution of a number of lines.

syntax_3886.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3886.title: Evaluate Effect
syntax_3886.description: Executes the given dynamic Skript effect code.

en: Executes the given dynamic Skript effect code.

syntax_3887.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3887.title: Execute Lambda
syntax_3887.description: Executes the given lambda, optionally X of times.

en: Executes the given lambda, optionally X of times.

syntax_3888.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3888.title: Homing
syntax_3888.description: Makes an entity go back to the given location. Using 'normally' reduces some bugs caused by varying distances, but makes it less accurate.
syntax_3888.syntax_pattern:
make %entity% home towards %location%
make %entities% home towards %location% normally

en: Makes an entity go back to the given location. Using 'normally' reduces some bugs caused by varying distances, but makes it less accurate.

syntax_3889.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3889.title: Leash
syntax_3889.description: Leash living entities to other entities.

en: Leash living entities to other entities.

syntax_3890.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3890.title: MIDI
syntax_3890.description: Plays a midi from a file or an URL to the specified players optionally with specified tempo and ID.
syntax_3890.syntax_pattern:
play midi [from] %string% (for|to) %players% [at [tempo] %number%] [with id %string%]
play midi from (website|link) %string% (for|to) %players% [at [tempo] %number%] [with id %string%]

en: Plays a midi from a file or an URL to the specified players optionally with specified tempo and ID.

syntax_3891.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3891.title: MIDI Stop
syntax_3891.description: Stops the midi with the ID.

en: Stops the midi with the ID.

syntax_3892.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3892.title: Make Damage
syntax_3892.description: Makes a living entity damage another.

en: Makes a living entity damage another.

syntax_3893.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3893.title: Make Say
syntax_3893.description: Forces a player to send a message to the chat. If the message starts with a slash it will force the player to use command.

en: Forces a player to send a message to the chat. If the message starts with a slash it will force the player to use command.

syntax_3895.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3895.title: Option Developer Mode
syntax_3895.description: Makes the script automatically reload if a change have been made.

en: Makes the script automatically reload if a change have been made.

syntax_3896.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3896.title: Option Skript Permissions Manager
syntax_3896.description: Makes SkQuery a permissions manager on the server. You will then be able to access the expressions that represent player permissions and change them.

en: Makes SkQuery a permissions manager on the server. You will then be able to access the expressions that represent player permissions and change them.

syntax_3897.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3897.title: Option Thread
syntax_3897.description: Makes the next line run on a different thread. The code below the next line will be delayed until the thread finishes. Please note that Bukkit stuff aren't thread safe.

en: Makes the next line run on a different thread. The code below the next line will be delayed until the thread finishes. Please note that Bukkit stuff aren't thread safe.

syntax_3898.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3898.title: Pathfind
syntax_3898.description: Makes a living entity pathfind to the given location with the specified speed.

en: Makes a living entity pathfind to the given location with the specified speed.

syntax_3899.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3899.title: Player Visibility
syntax_3899.description: Change visibility of a player for the given players. If a player was hidden and relogs, this player will be visible again.

en: Change visibility of a player for the given players. If a player was hidden and relogs, this player will be visible again.

syntax_3900.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3900.title: Pop
syntax_3900.description: Instantly detonates a firework effect at the given location. Having multiple effects will cause them to stack.

en: Instantly detonates a firework effect at the given location. Having multiple effects will cause them to stack.

syntax_3901.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3901.title: Set Block Without Update
syntax_3901.description: Set blocks to another type of blocks without causing surrounding blocks to update.

en: Set blocks to another type of blocks without causing surrounding blocks to update.

syntax_3902.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3902.title: Shoot Item Projectile
syntax_3902.description: Shoots an item from a living entity with the specified speed.

en: Shoots an item from a living entity with the specified speed.

syntax_3903.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3903.title: Show Credits
syntax_3903.description: Shows the end credists to the given player.

en: Shows the end credists to the given player.
Shutdowns the server.

syntax_3905.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3905.title: Tame
syntax_3905.description: Tames given entities to a player.

en: Tames given entities to a player.

syntax_3906.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3906.title: Texture
syntax_3906.description: Sends a resource pack from an URL to the specified players.

en: Sends a resource pack from an URL to the specified players.

syntax_3907.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3907.title: Trail
syntax_3907.description: Makes trail of particles for the projectile in a shoot event.

en: Makes trail of particles for the projectile in a shoot event.

syntax_3908.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3908.title: Value at Index
syntax_3908.description: Returns the value at the given index of a list.

en: Returns the value at the given index of a list.

syntax_3911.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3911.title: Art
syntax_3911.description: The art of a painting. Can be set or reset.

en: The art of a painting. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3912.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3912.title: Blast Radius
syntax_3912.description: The explosion strength of an explosive entity (like primed TNT, fireballs and wither skull). Can be set or reset.

en: The explosion strength of an explosive entity (like primed TNT, fireballs and wither skull). Can be set or reset.

syntax_3913.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3913.title: Block Chunk
syntax_3913.description: Returns the blocks in a chunk. Can be changed.

en: Returns the blocks in a chunk. Can be changed.

syntax_3914.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3914.title: Block Cube
syntax_3914.description: Returns the blocks between two locations as a cube. Can be changed.

en: Returns the blocks between two locations as a cube. Can be changed.

syntax_3915.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3915.title: Block in Chunk
syntax_3915.description: The block at the given coordinates in a chunk. Can be changed.

en: The block at the given coordinates in a chunk. Can be changed.

syntax_3916.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3916.title: Border
syntax_3916.description: The world border of a world. Can be deleted or reset.

en: The world border of a world. Can be deleted or reset.

syntax_3909.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3909.title: Arrow Critical State
syntax_3909.description: The critical state of an arrow. Can be set or reset.

en: The critical state of an arrow. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3917.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3917.title: Border Center
syntax_3917.description: The center location of a world border. Can be set.

en: The center location of a world border. Can be set.

syntax_3918.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3918.title: Border Damage Amount
syntax_3918.description: The damage amount of a world border. Can be set.

en: The damage amount of a world border. Can be set.

syntax_3919.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3919.title: Border Damage Buffer
syntax_3919.description: The damage buffer (amount of blocks a player may safely be outside the border before taking damage) of a world border. Can be set. Default is 5.

en: The damage buffer (amount of blocks a player may safely be outside the border before taking damage) of a world border. Can be set. Default is 5.

syntax_3920.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3920.title: Border Size
syntax_3920.description: The size of a world border. Can be changed.

en: The size of a world border. Can be changed.

syntax_3921.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3921.title: Border Warning Distance
syntax_3921.description: The warning distance of a world border. Can be set.

en: The warning distance of a world border. Can be set.

syntax_3922.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3922.title: Border Warning Time
syntax_3922.description: The warning time of a world border. Can be changed.

en: The warning time of a world border. Can be changed.

syntax_3923.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3923.title: Character index
syntax_3923.description: Returns the character at the given index of a text.

en: Returns the character at the given index of a text.

syntax_3924.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3924.title: Check
syntax_3924.description: Returns the result of a predicate.

en: Returns the result of a predicate.

syntax_3925.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3925.title: Complicated Math
syntax_3925.syntax_pattern:
sin[e] %number%
cos[ine] %number%
tan[gent] %number%
arc sin[e] %number%
arc cos[ine] %number%
arc tan[gent] %number%
hyperbolic sin[e] %number%
hyperbolic cos[ine] %number%
hyperbolic tan[gent] %number%
[natural ]log[arithm] %number%
base(-| )10 log[arithm] %number%
signum %number%
(sqrt|square root)[ of] %number%
(%number% factorial|%number%!)

syntax_3926.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3926.title: Direction From to
syntax_3926.description: Returns the direction from a location to another location.

en: Returns the direction from a location to another location.

syntax_3927.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3927.title: Enchant Level
syntax_3927.description: Returns the enchantment cost in an enchant event.

en: Returns the enchantment cost in an enchant event.

syntax_3928.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3928.title: Entities of Chunk
syntax_3928.description: Returns all entities in a chunk. Can be added to or remove from.

en: Returns all entities in a chunk. Can be added to or remove from.

syntax_3929.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3929.title: Exploded Blocks
syntax_3929.description: Returns the exploded blocks in an explode event.

en: Returns the exploded blocks in an explode event.

syntax_3930.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3930.title: Fake Max Players
syntax_3930.description: The fake maximum player count in a server list ping event. Can be set.

en: The fake maximum player count in a server list ping event. Can be set.

syntax_3931.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3931.title: Flight Mode
syntax_3931.description: Whether the given players are allowed to fly.

en: Whether the given players are allowed to fly.

syntax_3932.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3932.title: Former Location
syntax_3932.description: The former location in a player move event.

en: The former location in a player move event.
Returns glowing items.

syntax_3936.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3936.title: Hotbar Slot
syntax_3936.description: The selected hotbar slot index of a player (0-9). Can be changed!

en: The selected hotbar slot index of a player (0-9). Can be changed!

syntax_3940.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3940.title: Inventory Name
syntax_3940.description: Gets the title of the viewed inventory in an inventory click event.

en: Gets the title of the viewed inventory in an inventory click event.
Can be changed.

syntax_3942.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3942.title: Random Text
syntax_3942.description: Returns a random text generated from the given regex.

en: Returns a random text generated from the given regex.

syntax_3944.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3944.title: Land Boats
syntax_3944.description: Whether a boat can work on land. Might not work as expected on some Minecraft versions.

en: Whether a boat can work on land. Might not work as expected on some Minecraft versions.

syntax_3945.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3945.title: Loaded Chunks
syntax_3945.description: Returns the loaded chunks of the given worlds.

en: Returns the loaded chunks of the given worlds.

syntax_3935.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3935.title: Health Scale Mode
syntax_3935.description: Whether the player should see their health as scaled. See the [Health Scale](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3934) expression.

en: Whether the player should see their health as scaled. See the [Health Scale](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3934) expression.

syntax_3938.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3938.title: Image from URL
syntax_3938.description: Gets the image from a direct image link.

en: Gets the image from a direct image link.

syntax_3937.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3937.title: Local Image
syntax_3937.description: Gets the image of a local PNG file. See examples.

en: Gets the image of a local PNG file. See examples.

syntax_3947.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3947.title: Max Minecart Speed
syntax_3947.description: The maximum speed of a minecart. Can be set. The default is 0.4.

en: The maximum speed of a minecart. Can be set. The default is 0.4.

syntax_3948.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3948.title: Modulus
syntax_3948.description: Returns the modulo of the given numbers, i.e. the remainder of the division of them.

en: Returns the modulo of the given numbers, i.e. the remainder of the division of them.

syntax_3949.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3949.title: Moon Phase
syntax_3949.description: Returns the current moon phase of a world.

en: Returns the current moon phase of a world.

syntax_3950.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3950.title: New Line
syntax_3950.description: A line break (LF). Can be used in so many places like messages, books, MOTD, files...

en: A line break (LF). Can be used in so many places like messages, books, MOTD, files...
Returns a random UUID.
Returns the nth prime number.

syntax_3955.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3955.title: Plugin Version
syntax_3955.description: Returns the version of a plugin.

en: Returns the version of a plugin.

syntax_3956.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3956.title: Primer
syntax_3956.description: The entity that primed the given tNT.
syntax_3956.syntax_pattern:
[the] (primer|fuse lighting piece of shit) of %entities%
%entities%'[s] (primer|fuse lighting piece of shit)

en: The entity that primed the given tNT.

syntax_3958.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3958.title: Regain Reason
syntax_3958.description: The regen cause in a heal event.

en: The regen cause in a heal event.

syntax_3965.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3965.title: Tame Owner
syntax_3965.description: The owner of a tameable animal. Can be set or reset.

en: The owner of a tameable animal. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3966.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3966.title: Tile Entities
syntax_3966.description: Returns all tile entities in a chunk. Can be changed.

en: Returns all tile entities in a chunk. Can be changed.

syntax_3967.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3967.title: Player Time
syntax_3967.description: Client side time of a player. Can be set or reset.

en: Client side time of a player. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3970.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3970.title: Villager Job
syntax_3970.description: The profession of a villager. Can be set or reset.

en: The profession of a villager. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3971.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3971.title: Art
syntax_3971.type_usage: kebab, aztec, alban, aztec2, bomb, plant, wasteland, pool, courbet, sea, sunset, creebet, wanderer, graham, match, bust, stage, void, skull and roses, wither, fighters, pointer, pigscene, burning skull, skeleton, donkey kong

syntax_3973.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3973.title: Moon Phase
syntax_3973.type_usage: new moon, waxing crescent, first quarter, waxing gibbous, full moon, waning gibbous, last quarter, waning crescent

syntax_3974.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3974.title: Particle
syntax_3974.type_usage: explosion normal, explosion large, explosion huge, fireworks spark, water bubble, water splash, water wake, suspended, suspended depth, crit, crit magic, smoke normal, smoke large, spell, spell instant, spell mob, spell mob ambient, spell witch, drip water, drip lava, villager angry, villager happy, town aura, note, portal, enchantment table, flame, lava, cloud, redstone, snowball, snow shovel, slime, heart, barrier, item crack, block crack, block dust, water drop, mob appearance, dragon breath, end rod, damage indicator, sweep attack, falling dust, totem, spit, squid ink, bubble pop, current down, bubble column up, nautilus, dolphin, legacy block crack, legacy block dust, legacy falling dust

syntax_3975.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3975.title: Profession
syntax_3975.type_usage: normal, farmer, librarian, priest, blacksmith, butcher, nitwit, husk

syntax_3976.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3976.title: Regain Reason
syntax_3976.type_usage: regen, satiated, eating, ender crystal, magic, magic regen, wither spawn, wither, custom

syntax_3961.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3961.title: Number to Roman Numeral
syntax_3961.description: Returns a number converted to roman numeral.

en: Returns a number converted to roman numeral.

syntax_3960.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3960.title: Roman Numeral to Number
syntax_3960.description: Returns a roman numeral converted to number.

en: Returns a roman numeral converted to number.

syntax_3910.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3910.title: Arrow Knockback Strength
syntax_3910.description: The knockback strength of an arrow. Can be set or reset.

en: The knockback strength of an arrow. Can be set or reset.

syntax_3934.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3934.title: Health Scale
syntax_3934.description:
The number to scale the health the player sees. Can be changed and changing this will also enable [scaled health mode](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3935).

The formula to display the health is: `health / max health * health scale`

en:
The number to scale the health the player sees. Can be changed and changing this will also enable [scaled health mode](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3935).

The formula to display the health is: `health / max health * health scale`

syntax_3939.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3939.title: Incendiary Explosion
syntax_3939.description: Whether an explosive entity (primed TNT, fireballs and wither skull) should cause fire.

en: Whether an explosive entity (primed TNT, fireballs and wither skull) should cause fire.

syntax_3962.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3962.title: Server Icon
syntax_3962.description:
The server icon in a server list ping event. Will always return nothing, can be set to an image.
See also: [Local Image](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3937) and [Image from URL](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3938) expressions

en:
The server icon in a server list ping event. Will always return nothing, can be set to an image.
See also: [Local Image](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3937) and [Image from URL](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3938) expressions

syntax_3866.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3866.title: On Server List Ping
syntax_3866.description:
Called when a server list ping is coming in, generally when a Minecraft client pings the server to show its information in the server list.
See also: [MOTD](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3946), [Server Icon](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3962) and [Fake Max Players](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3930) expressions

en:
Called when a server list ping is coming in, generally when a Minecraft client pings the server to show its information in the server list.
See also: [MOTD](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3946), [Server Icon](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3962) and [Fake Max Players](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3930) expressions

syntax_3861.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3861.title: On Falling Block Land
syntax_3861.description: Called when a falling block lands. The `event-block` will be the block that the falling block will land to, waiting a tick would give the landed block.

en: Called when a falling block lands. The `event-block` will be the block that the falling block will land to, waiting a tick would give the landed block.

syntax_3968.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3968.title: Player Time (Relative)
syntax_3968.description:
Client side time of a player. If 'relative', the time will be relative to the world (so it will be changing and the `doDaylightCycle` gamerule affects it), otherwise the time will stay fixed.
Can be set or reset.

en:
Client side time of a player. If 'relative', the time will be relative to the world (so it will be changing and the `doDaylightCycle` gamerule affects it), otherwise the time will stay fixed.
Can be set or reset.

syntax_3894.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3894.title: New Recipe
syntax_3894.description: Registers a new crafting recipe. All 9 slots must be present, use `air` to indicate the slot is not used.
syntax_3894.syntax_pattern:
register new shaped recipe for %itemtype% using %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%
register new shapeless recipe for %itemtype% using %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%, %itemtype%

en: Registers a new crafting recipe. All 9 slots must be present, use `air` to indicate the slot is not used.
